raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Senate Bill 429 creates the nation’s first public wildfire catastrophe model.",
    "The public wildfire catastrophe model is intended to assess wildfire risk and inform insurance rates.",
    "The public model aims to provide transparency to homeowners regarding their property's wildfire risk.",
    "Homeowners can proactively reduce wildfire risk if they know their risk score.",
    "The public wildfire catastrophe model predicts future losses and serves as a benchmark for fair and accurate insurance rates.",
    "The bill includes a one-year moratorium on insurance cancellations in high fire severity zones.",
    "The bill requires annual inspections to maintain defensible space requirements in high fire severity zones."
  ]
}
```
